results.overview: After a threat from the tiger Shere Khan, Mowgli, a man-cub fostered by wolves, is forced to flee the jungle, and he embarks on a journey of self-discovery with the help of the panther, Bagheera, and the free-spirited bear, Baloo.
results.title: The Jungle Book

results.overview: The boy Mowgli makes his way to the man-village with Bagheera, the wise panther. Along the way he meets jazzy King Louie, the hypnotic snake Kaa and the lovable, happy-go-lucky bear Baloo, who teaches Mowgli "The Bare Necessities" of life and the true meaning of friendship.
results.title: The Jungle Book

results.name: The Jungle Book
results.overview: About the adventures of Mowgli, a human foundling raised by Akela's wolf pack, and his best friends, fatherly bear Baloo and playful panther Bagheera. They live in the Indian jungle where many dangers lurk, such as the mighty Bengal tiger Shere Khan. The inquisitive Mowgli often gets himself into trouble and can't resist helping animals in danger or solving other problems.

results.name: The Jungle Book: The Adventures of Mowgli
results.original_name: ジャングルブック・少年モーグリ
results.overview:
Jungle Book Shōnen Mowgli is an anime adaptation of Rudyard Kipling's original collection of stories, The Jungle Book. It aired in 1989, and consists of a total of 52 episodes.

The series, a compromise between the original Mowgli stories and the Walt Disney version, received international acclaim and was aired in different countries around the world.

Raised by wild animals since childhood, Mowgli is drawn away from the jungle by the beautiful Kitty. But Mowgli must eventually face corrupt Capt. Boone, who wants both Kitty's hand and the treasures of Monkey City – a place only Mowgli can find.
results.title: The Jungle Book

results.overview: The jungle is roaring with excitement when Mowgli, Baloo and all their animal friends stir up fun and pandemonium in this party packed adventure. Baloo becomes royalty, bouncing baby elephants everywhere and Mowgli holds both a fishing and a fitness contest!
results.title: The Jungle Book Jungle Party

results.overview: Never before has the lore of the jungle been made more appealing than in this magical, musical adaptation of Rudyard Kipling's "The Jungle Book." Join Mowgli, the man-child, as he learns the laws of the jungle from his friends, Baloo the bear, and Bagheera the panther. Journey with them as they battle evil monkeys, sinister snakes and the dreaded Bengal tiger, Shere Kahn. This breath- taking adventure is a beautifully illustrated, heartwarming tale with lessons for all and fun for all time.
results.title: The Jungle Book

results.original_title: ジャングルブック・少年モーグリ
results.overview: Watch Rudyard Kipling's world famous novel, The Jungle Book, come alive in this high quality entertaining animated feature. Join young Mowgli, and his animal friends Bagheera and Baloo, on their adventures in the wilderness.
results.title: The Jungle Book

results.overview: A modern-day adaptation of the work created by the classic author Rudyard Kipling.
results.title: The Jungle Book

results.overview: A 1992 animated version of The Jungle Book by Bevanfield Films.
results.title: The Jungle Book

results.original_title: Jungle Book 3D Rikki-Tikki-Tavi To The Rescue
results.title: Jungle Book 3D Rikki-Tikki-Tavi To The Rescue

results.overview: In the magical forest, the elephants dance and shake the whole jungle. The monkeys at the top of the trees make faces at the sly snake and the pack of wolves is joined by a new member - his name is Mowgli. Mowgli, a baby who is alone in the jungle, is adopted by the pack. The viewers follow Mowgli, how he survives, how his friends Bagheera the panther and Baloo the bear manage to save him from Shirkhan, the terrible tiger who wants to kill him. And finally the meeting with the human daughter, Mowgli's falling in love with Bana and the difficult decision to leave the forest.
results.title: The Jungle Book The Musical

results.overview: In the wild and exotic Indian jungle, there are the classic characters Baloo, Bagheera, Kaa and the dreaded Shere Kahn.
results.title: The Jungle Book - The Musical

results.overview: After the death of his parents, the baby Mowgli is raised by a family of wolves in the jungle. Throughout the story, the boy is hunted by Shere Khan, the Bengal tiger, but he is protected by Bagheera, the black panther, and Baloo, the brown bear who teaches him the Laws of the Jungle.
results.title: The Jungle Book: The Adventures of Mowgli

results.overview: Mowgli has been living in the man-village with his little stepbrother Ranjan and his best friend Shanti. But the man-cub still has that jungle rhythm in his heart, and he misses his old buddies Baloo and Bagheera. When Mowgli wanders back to the wild for some swingin' fun, he soon finds the man-eating tiger Shere Khan is lurking in the shadows and planning his revenge.
results.title: The Jungle Book 2

results.original_title: The Second Jungle Book: Mowgli & Baloo
results.overview: In this exciting live-action adventure, young Mowgli, an orphan raised by wolves, is spotted by a scout for a giant circus. Accompanied by a cruel hunter and a snake charmer, the scout sets out to trap Mowgli. But with the help of Baloo the bear and Bagheera the panther, little Mowgli leads the adults into his biggest and wildest adventure yet! A fun-filled movie every member of the family will enjoy.
results.title: The Second Jungle Book: Mowgli & Baloo

results.name: Mowgli: The New Adventures of the Jungle Book
results.original_name: Mowgli: The New Adventures of the Jungle Book
results.overview: A contemporary live-action adaptation of The Jungle Book, the series has Mowgli joined on his adventures by a young American girl, named Nahbiri, who has accompanied her widowed doctor father to Jabalpur, India.

results.name: The Jungle Book Safari
results.overview: In each episode, animated Mowgli and his "Jungle Book" friends discuss one of their favorite topics: animals! They serve as the show's anchors and provide the wrap-around elements for the documentary footage of the animals featured in short, non-fiction parts.
An animated version of the classic Rudyard Kipling book about a boy who grows up in the jungle.
results.title: The Jungle Book: The Movie
